## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue/motivation.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update / CI maintenance

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style and guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with 0 errors.
- [ ] `npm run test` passes all unit tests.
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes without TypeScript errors.
